# REQ-FR-260007: Resolve legal rollout and visual direction for launch readiness

- ID: FR-260007
- Class: FR (Functional Requirement)
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-05-21
- Owner: Repository owner

## Statement

The Crystord public site shall launch with reviewed carry-over legal/support pages from the archive,
followed by a planned full rewrite, and shall use a modernized visual direction that preserves brand
identity while replacing archive-era layout/styling patterns.

## Rationale

Launch readiness requires legal/support coverage without unnecessary delay, while design quality
requires modernization without losing product recognition.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Legal/support rollout follows two phases:
  - Phase 1: reviewed archive-derived legal/support content published,
  - Phase 2: full rewrite is tracked and scheduled.
- Phase-1 content receives explicit accuracy review before publication.
- Visual implementation preserves brand anchors (logo/core cues) but modernizes layout/typography/
  spacing/components.
- Archive-era layout/styling patterns are not reintroduced.
